title: Offbar launches as India's First Invite-Only Community App for Law Professionals and Law Students
description: A new platform aimed at addressing the gap in professional networking and community within the Indian legal sector has launched. Offbar, a private, invite-only community application built for lawyers and law students, is now available on the App Store and Google Play.Offbar positions itself as the first dedicated community and networking platform of its kind built specifically for India's legal profession.
